title: Add AI · RPG Engine to games
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Roll for initiative
gist.blurb: The AI · RPG Engine has officially joined the Pollinations arcade. Time to roll some digital dice and embark on a new AI-powered adventure.
gist.summary: Added the AI · RPG Engine to the community games showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and play the AI · RPG Engine directly from our community apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: RPG and tabletop gaming theme. The Pollinations bee dressed as a classic RPG character (like a tiny wizard) playing a game with the Monitor Robot. Dice, fantasy maps, and cozy retro gaming vibes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, rolling a 20-sided die on a wooden tavern table. A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head sits across the table, displaying a pixelated fantasy map on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
